Title: Add content item
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Navigate to Marketing > Dynamic Content > Content Items
2. Click 'Add'
3. Fill in content item details (name, type, HTML)
4. Click 'Create'
Expected Result: Content item created and displayed in list

Title: Edit content item (name/description/type/HTML)
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Content item exists [MKT-001]
Steps:
1. Open content item > Update name > Save
2. Update description > Save
3. Add new content type > Save
4. Update HTML > Save
Expected Result: All changes saved and persisted

Title: Delete content item and bulk delete
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Content items exist
Steps:
1. Delete single content item > Confirm
2. Select multiple items > Bulk delete > Confirm
Expected Result: Items deleted individually and in bulk

Title: Search content items
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Multiple content items exist
Steps:
1. Enter search term in list view
2. Verify matching results
Expected Result: Search returns matching content items

Title: Add/edit/delete content folder
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Add content folder > Fill name and description > Create
2. Edit folder name > Save
3. Edit folder description > Save
4. Delete folder
Expected Result: Folder CRUD operations work correctly

Expected Result: Name is required. Promotion created with name.

Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Promotion exists with conditions

Expected Result: Active: promotion applied on storefront. Inactive: not applied.

3. Set expiration in past > Check storefront > Not applied
4. Set expiration in future > Check storefront > Applied
Expected Result: Start/expiration dates correctly control promotion availability

Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Promotion with conditions exists
Steps:
1. Get $X off cart subtotal > Verify discount
2. Get X% off cart subtotal not to exceed $Y > Verify discount and cap
Expected Result: Cart subtotal effects applied correctly with caps

Title: Effects: Entry and free item discounts
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Promotion with product conditions exists
Steps:
1. Get $X off > Verify
2. Get $X off Y items of entry > Verify
3. Get X% off not to exceed $Y > Verify
4. Get X% off for Y items not to exceed $Z > Verify
5. Get X free items of product > Verify
6. Complex: For X in every Y items get Z% off > Verify
Expected Result: All entry-level and free item effects work correctly

Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront

Steps:

2. Get X% off shipping not to exceed $Y > Verify
3. Get $X off payment method > Verify
4. Get X% off payment method not to exceed $Y > Verify
Expected Result: Shipping and payment method effects applied correctly

Title: Stackable Combination Policy
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Two promotions configured
Steps:
1. Switch to CombineStackable policy (Settings)
2. Both promos 'Can be combined' > Verify both applied
3. Promo A combinable + Promo B exclusive > Verify only B
4. Promo A exclusive + Promo B combinable > Verify only A
5. Both exclusive > Verify higher priority wins
Expected Result: Stackable combination rules work correctly

Title: Best Reward Policy
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Two promotions with different discounts
Steps:
1. Switch to BestReward policy (Settings)
2. Apply both promos to cart
3. Verify promo with biggest discount is applied
Expected Result: Promo with biggest discount applied under Best Reward policy

Title: Promotion priority comparison
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Two promotions with different priorities
Steps:
1. Equal priority: Regular user + cart subtotal > X > Verify free shipping
2. Equal priority: Regular user + cart subtotal < X > Verify no free shipping
3. Equal priority: First time buyer + cart subtotal > X > Verify discount + free shipping
4. Priority 1 > Priority 2: First time buyer scenarios > Verify higher priority applied first
5. Higher priority: Regular user scenarios
Expected Result: Priority ordering correctly determines promotion application order

Expected Result: Required field validation works. Coupon created.

Admin logged in to Backend
Coupons exist

Expected Result: Delete works. Search returns matching coupons.

Title: Import coupons (valid and invalid files)
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
CSV files prepared
Steps:
1. Import valid file > Add new coupons > Verify created
2. Import valid file > Update existing coupons > Verify updated
3. Import invalid: missing coupon_code column > Verify error
4. Import invalid: missing max_uses_number column > Verify error
5. Import invalid: wrong delimiter > Verify error
6. Import invalid: text in max_uses_number > Verify error
Expected Result: Valid imports succeed. Invalid imports show appropriate errors.

Title: Personal coupon assignment (organization/user/anonymous)
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Personal coupon exists
Organization with members exists
Steps:
1. Assign coupon to organization > Check via org member > Verify works
2. Assign to organization > Check via anonymous > Verify not applied
3. Assign to organization > Check via non-member > Verify not applied
4. Assign to user > Check via that user > Verify works
5. Assign to user > Check via another user > Verify not applied
6. No assignment > Check via various users > Verify behavior
Expected Result: Personal coupons correctly restricted to assigned organizations/users

Title: Coupon applied in storefront
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Coupon with promotion exists
Steps:
1. Add coupon code in storefront cart
2. Verify promotion is applied
Expected Result: Coupon activates promotion on storefront

Title: Coupon expiration and usage limits
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Coupon exists
Steps:
1. Set expiration in past > Try on storefront > Verify not applied
2. Set expiration in future > Verify applied
3. Set uses < max uses > Verify applied
4. Set uses >= max uses > Verify not applied
5. Set uses per user > max per user > Verify not applied
6. Set uses per user < max per user > Verify applied
Expected Result: Expiration and usage limits correctly control coupon availability

Title: Multi-store promotion selection and access
Preconditions:

2. Change promo with access to 1 store > Verify restrictions
3. Change promo with access to both stores > Verify full access
Expected Result: Multi-store promotion access controlled correctly

Title: Gift availability rules

2. Set Can be purchased = false > Verify gift not available
3. Set Visible = false > Verify gift not available
